name: Textured Crop
description: Short on sides, textured on top. Modern low-maintenance cut.
styling_tips: Use matte clay for texture. Blow dry upward while tousling.
barber_instruction: Sides: #1.5 blended to #3. Top: Leave 6-7cm, add texture with point cutting. Finish: Natural, avoid hard lines.

name: Side Part
description: Classic professional cut with defined part line.
styling_tips: Use pomade for hold. Comb to the side when slightly damp.
barber_instruction: Sides: Mid fade. Top: Leave 8-10cm, create natural part line. Finish: Clean side sweep with pomade.

name: French Crop
description: Short all around with forward-fringe. Clean and modern.
styling_tips: Let fringe fall naturally. Use minimal product.
barber_instruction: Sides: High skin fade. Top: Leave 4-5cm, blunt fringe at forehead. Finish: Precise fringe line.

name: Quiff
description: Volume at the front, shorter on sides. Stylish and masculine.
styling_tips: Blow dry upward and back from front. Use pomade or clay for hold.
barber_instruction: Sides: Low-mid fade. Top: Leave 10-12cm, longer at front for volume. Finish: Lift and sweep back.

name: Buzz Cut
description: Ultra short all around. Ultimate low maintenance.
styling_tips: No styling needed. That is the beauty of it.
barber_instruction: All over: #2 clipper. Edge up hairline. Finish: Sharp clean lines.

name: Slick Back
description: All hair swept back. Retro but timeless.
styling_tips: Use strong-hold pomade. Comb back when wet.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper fade. Top: Leave 12-15cm. Finish: Sleek backward sweep with pomade.

name: Crew Cut
description: Short, tapered sides with slightly longer hair on top. Clean and versatile military-inspired cut.
styling_tips: Apply a small amount of matte paste and push forward or to the side.
barber_instruction: Sides: #2 taper. Top: Leave 3-4cm, slightly longer at front. Finish: Textured, not flat.

name: Ivy League
description: Longer version of the crew cut. Enough length on top to part or style to the side.
styling_tips: Use light pomade. Part to the side or push forward for a preppy look.
barber_instruction: Sides: #2-#3 taper. Top: Leave 4-6cm, longer at front. Finish: Side part or forward sweep.

name: Faux Hawk
description: Mohawk-inspired style without fully shaving the sides. Edgy but wearable.
styling_tips: Use strong-hold gel or wax. Push hair toward the center from both sides.
barber_instruction: Sides: Mid fade or taper, not shaved. Top: Leave 7-10cm, longest at center. Finish: Spike center upward.

name: Man Bun
description: Long hair tied into a bun at the back of the head. Laid-back and stylish.
styling_tips: Use a hair tie, avoid tight pulls to prevent hairline damage. Condition regularly.
barber_instruction: All over: Even length, minimum 20cm. Optionally undercut sides. Finish: Tie at crown or nape.

name: Top Knot
description: Hair tied into a small knot on top with shaved or faded sides. Clean and modern.
styling_tips: Grow top long, tie tightly. Use beard oil on sides if shaved.
barber_instruction: Sides: Skin fade or fully shaved. Top: Leave 15-20cm. Finish: Tie small knot at crown.

name: Curtain
description: Center-parted hair falling to both sides. 90s-inspired and very trendy.
styling_tips: Part in the middle while damp. Use light mousse for volume. Blow dry away from face.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or no fade. Top: Leave 10-15cm, layer for movement. Finish: Center part, curtain shape.

name: Edgar
description: Short sides with a blunt, straight-cut fringe across the forehead. Bold and edgy.
styling_tips: Brush fringe forward. Use matte clay for texture on top.
barber_instruction: Sides: High taper fade. Top: Leave 4-5cm, blunt fringe straight across. Finish: Sharp defined fringe line.

name: Mullet
description: Short on top and sides, long in the back. Retro rock-and-roll style making a comeback.
styling_tips: Let the back grow freely. Use texture spray on top for messy volume.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or fade. Top: Short-medium. Back: Leave 15cm+, layered. Finish: Business front, party back.

name: Wolf Cut
description: Shaggy, layered cut with volume on top and tapered ends. Trendy and effortlessly cool.
styling_tips: Air dry for natural texture. Use sea salt spray for messy definition.
barber_instruction: All over: Heavy layering, shorter layers on top graduating longer. Finish: Shaggy, textured, messy.

name: Taper Fade
description: Gradual fade from longer to shorter on the sides and back. Clean and versatile base for many styles.
styling_tips: Pair with any top style. Keep edges clean with regular barber visits.
barber_instruction: Sides: Gradual taper from longer at top to skin at nape and temples. Top: Client preference. Finish: Seamless blend.

name: Mid Fade
description: Fade starting at the midpoint of the head. Balanced and universally flattering.
styling_tips: Works with almost any top style. Keep the fade sharp with bi-weekly barber visits.
barber_instruction: Sides: Start fade at temple level, blend down to skin. Top: Any length. Finish: Clean mid-point transition.

name: Low Fade
description: Subtle fade starting just above the ear. Professional and understated.
styling_tips: Great for conservative settings. Pair with side part or pompadour.
barber_instruction: Sides: Start fade 1 inch above ear, blend to skin. Top: Any style. Finish: Subtle, professional gradient.

name: High Fade
description: Bold fade starting near the top of the head. High contrast and eye-catching.
styling_tips: Bold look — pair with textured or styled top. Regular barber visits essential.
barber_instruction: Sides: Start fade at parietal ridge, blend aggressively to skin. Top: Styled. Finish: High contrast.

name: Burst Fade
description: Fade that curves around the ear in a burst pattern. Sporty and modern.
styling_tips: Works great with a mohawk or faux hawk on top. Keep the burst shape sharp.
barber_instruction: Sides: Fade curves around ear in semicircle shape. Top: Medium length. Finish: Defined burst arc.

name: Mohawk
description: Strip of longer hair running down the center with shaved sides. Bold and rebellious.
styling_tips: Use strong-hold gel or wax to keep the center strip upright.
barber_instruction: Sides: Shaved or skin fade. Top: Center strip 5-10cm wide, 7-15cm long. Finish: Stand straight up.

name: Afro
description: Natural hair grown out in all directions. Celebrates natural texture and volume.
styling_tips: Moisturize regularly. Use a pick or wide-tooth comb. Shape with periodic trims.
barber_instruction: All over: Even length, shaped into rounded form. Finish: Round, symmetrical shape with clean edges.

name: Comb Over
description: Hair combed to one side. Can be sleek or textured depending on the occasion.
styling_tips: Use pomade for a sleek look or matte clay for a textured, modern version.
barber_instruction: Sides: Low or mid fade. Top: Leave 8-10cm, longer on one side. Finish: Comb to the side with volume.

name: Caesar Cut
description: Short, horizontally cut fringe. Named after Julius Caesar. Clean and timeless.
styling_tips: Push forward with a small amount of paste. Keep fringe straight.
barber_instruction: Sides: #2-#3 taper. Top: Leave 3-4cm, blunt horizontal fringe. Finish: Clean forward fringe line.

name: Layered Cut
description: Multiple lengths layered throughout for movement and volume. Versatile and flattering.
styling_tips: Use texture spray to define layers. Blow dry with fingers for natural movement.
barber_instruction: All over: Layer at multiple lengths for movement. Top longer, sides tapered. Finish: Textured, flowing layers.

name: Messy Crop
description: Intentionally tousled, undone look. Effortlessly cool and casual.
styling_tips: Use matte clay or sea salt spray. Rough-dry and tousle with fingers.
barber_instruction: Sides: Short taper or fade. Top: Leave 5-7cm, point-cut for texture. Finish: Messy, natural-looking.

name: Spiky Hair
description: Hair styled upward into spikes. Fun, youthful, and edgy.
styling_tips: Use strong-hold gel or wax. Pull sections upward with fingers.
barber_instruction: Sides: Short taper. Top: Leave 5-8cm, textured for grip. Finish: Individual spikes pointing up.

name: Fringe
description: Hair falling forward over the forehead. Can be blunt, textured, or curtain-style.
styling_tips: Let it fall naturally or sweep to the side. Use light product for texture.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or fade. Top: Leave 8-12cm at front, shorter toward crown. Finish: Natural forward fall.

name: Crop Top
description: Short textured top with tapered sides. Clean and modern — the European go-to.
styling_tips: Use matte clay for a textured finish. Push forward or to the side.
barber_instruction: Sides: Skin fade or high taper. Top: Leave 3-5cm, heavy texture. Finish: Short, choppy, textured.

name: Pompadour
description: Volume at the front swept upward and back. Classic rock-and-roll style, modernized.
styling_tips: Blow dry upward and back with a round brush. Use strong-hold pomade.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or fade. Top: Leave 12-15cm, longest at front. Finish: Volume swept up and back.

name: Undercut
description: Sharp contrast between long top and very short or shaved sides. Bold and striking.
styling_tips: Style the top any way — slick back, side part, or textured. Keep sides clean.
barber_instruction: Sides: #0 or #1 clipper. Top: Leave 10-15cm. Finish: Sharp disconnect between sides and top.

name: Textured Quiff
description: Modern take on the quiff with more texture and less polish. Casual yet stylish.
styling_tips: Use matte clay. Blow dry upward while tousling for natural texture.
barber_instruction: Sides: Low-mid fade. Top: Leave 8-10cm, point-cut for texture. Finish: Messy volume at front.

name: Curtain Bangs
description: Face-framing bangs parted down the middle or slightly off-center. Soft and flattering.
styling_tips: Blow dry bangs outward from center using a round brush. Use light mousse.
barber_instruction: Sides: No fade or soft taper. Top: Leave 12-15cm, layered. Finish: Curtain part with face-framing bangs.

name: Flat Top
description: Hair standing upright and cut perfectly flat across the top. Retro military style with modern appeal.
styling_tips: Use strong-hold product. Requires precise barber maintenance.
barber_instruction: Sides: High fade. Top: Cut flat and level, 2-3cm. Finish: Perfectly flat, level surface.

name: Long Fringe
description: Extended fringe that covers part of the forehead. Modern and youthful.
styling_tips: Use sea salt spray. Sweep to the side or let hang forward.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or undercut. Top: Leave 15cm+ at front, shorter toward back. Finish: Long, sweeping fringe.

name: Curly Undercut
description: Faded or shaved sides with natural curls on top. Shows off curly texture beautifully.
styling_tips: Use curl cream on damp hair. Let air dry or diffuse. Don't brush.
barber_instruction: Sides: Skin fade or #1. Top: Leave 5-10cm, natural curls. Finish: Clean sides, voluminous curls on top.

name: High Top Fade
description: Flat or rounded top with high fade on sides. Iconic 80s/90s style, back in fashion.
styling_tips: Use a sponge or pick for definition. Shape the top with regular trims.
barber_instruction: Sides: High skin fade. Top: Leave 5-8cm, flat or rounded. Finish: Sharp, defined high top.

name: Dreadlocks
description: Hair matted into rope-like strands. Cultural and personal expression with versatile styling.
styling_tips: Palm roll or twist regularly. Keep clean and moisturized. Retwist every 4-6 weeks.
barber_instruction: All over: Section and start locs with twist or crochet method. Maintain with regular retwisting. Finish: Even, defined locs.

name: Twist Out
description: Two-strand twists unraveled for defined, textured curls. Popular natural hair style.
styling_tips: Twist damp hair with curl cream. Let dry completely, then unravel gently.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or fade. Top: Leave 5-10cm. Finish: Defined twist-out curls with natural volume.

name: Sponge Twists
description: Short coils created with a hair sponge. Quick, defined, and natural-looking.
styling_tips: Rub a curl sponge in circular motions on damp hair with styling product.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or fade. Top: Leave 3-5cm. Finish: Uniform sponge-defined coils.

name: Line Up
description: Sharp, clean lines cut along the hairline, temples, and sideburns. Sharpens any haircut.
styling_tips: Maintain the sharp edges with regular barber visits. Works as an add-on to any style.
barber_instruction: Edges: Sharp line-up at forehead, temples, and sideburns using trimmer. Finish: Crisp geometric lines.

name: Temp Fade
description: Fade concentrated at the temples. Subtle detail that adds sharpness to any cut.
styling_tips: Pair with any top style. Keep the temple fade sharp with regular touch-ups.
barber_instruction: Temples: Skin fade concentrated around temples. Rest: Taper or maintain length. Finish: Sharp temple transition.

name: Brushed Back Waves
description: Wavy hair brushed back for natural volume and flow. Relaxed yet polished.
styling_tips: Use sea salt spray on damp hair. Blow dry backward with fingers for natural wave flow.
barber_instruction: Sides: Taper or low fade. Top: Leave 10-12cm, layered. Finish: Natural backward wave flow.

name: Beachy Waves
description: Relaxed, sun-kissed waves with a casual feel. Low effort, high style.
styling_tips: Apply sea salt spray to damp hair. Air dry or rough-dry for natural texture.
barber_instruction: Sides: Soft taper. Top: Leave 8-12cm, layered for movement. Finish: Natural, tousled waves.

name: Curly Mullet
description: Mullet adapted for curly hair. Short tapered sides with longer curls in the back.
styling_tips: Let curls dry naturally. Use curl cream to define. Embrace the wild back.
barber_instruction: Sides: Short taper. Top: Medium. Back: Leave 15cm+, natural curls. Finish: Retro mullet shape with curls.

name: Curly Crop Top
description: Short, defined curls on top with clean faded sides. Modern and clean-cut for curly hair.
styling_tips: Use curl cream on damp hair. Scrunch and let air dry. Keep sides fresh.
barber_instruction: Sides: Skin fade or high taper. Top: Leave 3-5cm, natural curls. Finish: Short, defined curls on top.
